goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
